_meta.note: Match Lab v0.8 prototype bridge. Future generation should come from SkyrScout _shorts + player_slug + stored YouTube snapshots. Missing metrics remain null and give no effect. All current Shorts are created by Bon Scout.

events.title: The Spin Doctor
events.description: Sander Alamaa beats two defenders with close control, a sharp body feint and a perfectly timed nutmeg before accelerating away.

events.title: A Touch of Pure Genius
events.description: Erbol Atabaev cushions the ball on his foot, pops it over his marker's head without letting it hit the ground, then buries the volley into the far corner.

events.title: Top Corner
events.description: A free kick opens up. Yacqub Finey steps up and snipes the top corner.
